name: Apricot and Rice Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl combine flours, rice bran, baking powder and cinnamon.
2. Stir in rice, apricots, raisins, prunes and walnuts.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together the yogurt, syrup, oil and egg.
4. Pour over dry ingredients and fold together until just moistened. Do not overmix.
5. Line 18 muffin cups with paper liners. Divide the batter among cups.
6. Bake at 350°F until edges and tops begin to brown, about 45 minutes.
